Title: Verify Home Screen Navigation to PaginaFunzione
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Home screen.
2. Click on the PaginaFunzione option.
3. Verify that the PaginaFunzione page is displayed.
Expected Result: The PaginaFunzione page should be successfully loaded.

Title: Verify Camera Functionality
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open the camera functionality.
2. Take a photo.
3. Verify that the photo is captured and associated with LeMiePiante.
4. Verify that the photo is also associated with VereSpecieDellePianteFotografate.
Expected Result: The photo should be successfully captured and associated with both LeMiePiante and VereSpecieDellePianteFotografate.

Title: Verify Successful Login Process
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username and password.
2. Click on the login button.
3. Verify that the user is logged in successfully.
4. Verify that the token is generated and stored.
Expected Result: The user should be logged in successfully, and the token should be generated and stored.

Title: Verify Failed Login Process
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username and password.
2. Click on the login button.
3. Verify that the login fails.
Expected Result: The login attempt should fail, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

Title: Verify Plant Species Identification
Preconditions: User has taken a photo and uploaded it to the application.
Test Steps:
1. Upload the photo to the application.
2. Request species identification using the Gemini AI API.
3. Verify that the species is correctly identified.
4. Store the identified species information in Firebase Storage.
Expected Result: The plant species should be correctly identified, and the information should be stored in Firebase Storage.

Title: Verify Personal Storage Path Retrieval
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Request the personal storage path from Firebase Storage.
2. Verify that the personal storage path is returned.
Expected Result: The personal storage path should be successfully retrieved.

Title: Verify Photo Retrieval from Firebase Storage
Preconditions: User has uploaded a photo to Firebase Storage.
Test Steps:
1. Request the photo URL from Firebase Storage.
2. Verify that the photo is downloaded and displayed.
Expected Result: The photo should be successfully downloaded and displayed.

Title: Verify DataManager Interaction with Plant Management Use Cases
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Perform an operation related to plant management (e.g., insert a new plant).
2. Verify that the DataManager processes the request and updates the database accordingly.
Expected Result: The DataManager should process the request and update the database with the new plant information.

Title: Verify DataManager Interaction with Diary Management Use Cases
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Perform an operation related to diary management (e.g., add a new entry).
2. Verify that the DataManager processes the request and updates the database accordingly.
Expected Result: The DataManager should process the request and update the database with the new diary entry.

Title: Verify Shared Preference Storage
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Store the text in SharedPreference.
2. Retrieve the text from SharedPreference.
3. Verify that the text is correctly stored and retrieved.
Expected Result: The text should be successfully stored and retrieved from SharedPreference.

Title: Verify Shared Preference Retrieval Failure
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to retrieve text from SharedPreference.
2. Verify that the retrieval fails.
Expected Result: The retrieval should fail, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

Title: Verify Shared Preference Storage with Null Input
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to store a null value in SharedPreference.
2. Verify that the storage fails.
Expected Result: The storage should fail, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

Title: Verify Shared Preference Retrieval with Null Input
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to retrieve a null value from SharedPreference.
2. Verify that the retrieval fails.
Expected Result: The retrieval should fail, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.
